reviews.comment:
Fui con la inquietud de conocer la nueva remodelacion. El lugar y la atención muy buena. Me pareció interesante que tengan el  custodio de la estación de servicio.
El café no es bueno, deberían mejorarlo y la oferta de comida es poca y no es tentadora. Deberían urgente mejorar estos puntos para convertirlo en una opción para los vecinos.

(Translated by Google)
I went with the desire to see the new remodeling. The location and service were very good. I found it interesting that they have a gas station custodian.
The coffee isn't good; they should improve it, and the food offering is limited and not appealing. They urgently need to improve these aspects to make it an option for locals.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0dUppOHdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El Full de la Ypf de Cabildo y Arredondo es una estafa nada tiene precio te cobran lo que quieren además del horario tan limitado y media hora antes de que cierre ya están apagando las luces, no es como el de Olleros que está las 24 hs abierto. Muy mal aprovechado, medio cómo que atienden a las apuradas y por un sándwich me cobraron 10.000 pesos.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF Full Service store on Cabildo and Arredondo Street is a rip-off. Nothing is priceless. They charge you whatever they want. Plus, the hours are very limited, and half an hour before closing time, they're already turning off the lights. It's not like the one in Olleros, which is open 24 hours a day. It's a waste of time. It's almost as if they serve people in a hurry, and they charged me 10,000 pesos for a sandwich.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0c003YmFnEAE
